attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
SVJELO. BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUM_INT ,
SVJELO.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT ,
SVJELO. BK_COMPANY_CD ,
SVJELO.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY              ,
SVJELO.DV_VENDOR_INVOICE_DISTRIB_KEY as VENDOR_INVOICE_DISTRIB_KEY,
SVJELO.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT  ,
SVJELO.DV_FUNCTIONAL_AMT    ,
SVJELO.DV_USD_AMT      , 
SVJELO.DV_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT   ,
SVJELO.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD  ,
SVJELO.DV_TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD as TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD,
SVJELO.JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_DESCR      ,
case when SVJELO.DV_VENDOR_INVOICE_DISTRIB_KEY = -99999 then -666   
 when SVJELO.DV_VENDOR_INVOICE_DISTRIB_KEY = -99998 then -665 
  when SVJELO.DV_VENDOR_INVOICE_DISTRIB_KEY = -99997 then -664 
   when SVJELO.DV_VENDOR_INVOICE_DISTRIB_KEY = -99996 then -663
   end as AP_VENDOR_PARTY_KEY ,
'UNKNOWN'  as AP_VENDOR_NAME,
SVJELO.DV_VENDOR_INVOICE_DISTRIB_KEY  AS VENDOR_INVOICE_KEY, /* Default value is same */ 
-999  AS EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE_KEY,
'-999' EMPL_ID, /* BASED ON DIFFERENT UPDATE STATEMENTS IT WILL UPDATED FROM JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_DESCR */
SVJELO.SS_CD,
SVJELO.DD_BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT,
SVJELO.DD_BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT,
SVJELO.DD_BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT,
SVJELO.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CD,
SVJELO.DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD  ,
SVJELO.DD_BK_SUBACCOUNT_CD,
SVJELO.DD_BK_DEPT_CD  ,
SVJELO.DD_BK_PROJECT_CD ,
SVJELO.DD_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_MAPPED_CD
from 
(
select 
SVJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT ,
SVJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT  AS BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUM_INT ,
SVJEL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY              ,
SVJEL.BK_COMPANY_CODE AS BK_COMPANY_CD ,
SVJEL.DD_BK_DEPT_CD  ,
SVJEL.DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD  ,
SVJEL.DD_BK_PROJECT_CD ,
SVJEL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT  ,
SVJEL.JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_DESCR      ,
(COALESCE (SVJEL.RU_TRANSACTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT,0)    - COALESCE (SVJEL.RU_TRANSACTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT,0) )AS DV_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT   ,
(COALESCE (SVJEL.RU_DV_USD_DEBIT_AMT,0)           - COALESCE ( SVJEL.RU_DV_USD_CREDIT_AMT,0)  ) AS   DV_USD_AMT      , 
(COALESCE (SVJEL.RU_FUNCTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT,0)       - COALESCE (SVJEL.RU_FUNCTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT,0) ) AS DV_FUNCTIONAL_AMT    ,
SVJEL.BK_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE AS FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD  ,
SVJEL.SS_CD,
SVJEL.DD_BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT,
SVJEL.DD_BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT,
SVJEL.DD_BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT,
SVJEL.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CD,
SVJEL.DD_BK_SUBACCOUNT_CD,
SVJEL.DD_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_MAPPED_CD,
COALESCE (NJSLFVI.VENDOR_INVOICE_DISTRIB_KEY ,
      case   when SVJEL.SS_CD   ='MFG' then -99999
   when  SVJEL.SS_CD ='EMEA' then -99998
   when  SVJEL.SS_CD ='BV' then -99997
   when   SVJEL.SS_CD ='QTC' then -99996 end  ) as DV_VENDOR_INVOICE_DISTRIB_KEY,
NJE.TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD   as DV_TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE SVJEL 
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_JOURNAL_ENTRY NJE
	 ON ( NJE.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT = SVJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT
	 AND NJE.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY =SVJEL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY )
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_JEL_SRC_LNK_FRM_VNDR_INVOICE  NJSLFVI
	ON 	SVJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT  = NJSLFVI.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT
		AND SVJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT    =NJSLFVI.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT
		AND SVJEL.BK_COMPANY_CODE                =NJSLFVI.BK_COMPANY_CODE
		AND SVJEL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY =NJSLFVI.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_TRAVEL_COMPANIES ETC
 ON ETC.BK_COMPANY_CODE = SVJEL.BK_COMPANY_CODE 
 AND ETC.LEVEL05_ACCT_GROUP_ID = 'Other T&E'    
 and ETC.BK_COMPANY_CODE <> '020' 
 AND SVJEL.DD_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_MAPPED_CD IN ('MO','MC')
Inner Join $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMTY
 ON SVJEL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT =  RFMTY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT         
 and  RFMTY. FISCAL_YEAR_AGE between 0  and  2
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.R_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_HIERARCHY SVFAH
		ON 	SVFAH.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE = SVJEL.DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD
			AND SVFAH.LEVEL03_ACCT_GROUP_ID ='Expense'	
			AND SVFAH.LEVEL05_ACCT_GROUP_ID = 'Other T&E'   
where 
  NJSLFVI.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY is null  /* To bring records that are not linked to VENDOR_INVOICE_DISTRIBS */
)SVJELO
